title: HTTP Request node returns Error 422 due to incorrect data mapping
symptom: When sending data from the AI node to an HTTP Request node, an Error 422 is returned. This indicates that the data format is incorrect for the expected API input.
applies_when: Mapping data from an AI node output
not_this_if: Error occurs without using the AI node
Data is correctly formatted as a string
root_cause: The HTTP Request node is likely configured incorrectly, mapping an internal structure (which contains arrays) to a field that expects a simple string. This mismatch leads to the 422 error when the API cannot process the request due to invalid input.
fix_steps: Add a Function node before the HTTP Request node to parse the AI message output.
Use the provided JavaScript code to extract the relevant data from the AI message and format it correctly.
Map the output of the Function node to the HTTP Request node's body.
agent_instruction: Insert a Function node to parse the AI message and format the data correctly before sending it to the HTTP Request node.
